notes: Mobile / tablet UI overhaul (2026-06). Phone PORTRAIT is now supported (was force-landscape only). Bottom tool bar fixes: the cbar (📷カメラ / ☀日照 / 📐測定 / ⏺録画) no longer overlaps the joystick or the ▲▼ elevation arrows — it now sits clear above them — and 日照 + 録画 are available on phones again. Touch tap targets enlarged for easier pressing; the squished "U…" project-name label is hidden on phones. iPad portrait: the camera action row no longer collides with the シーンレイヤー panel, and the centred cbar no longer lands on the ▼ arrow. Verified clean (zero overlap / overflow) across phone & iPad in both portrait and landscape, plus desktop.
